PaginatedTableService.columns: id, slug, title, description, created_at, updated_at, username, bio, image, favorites_count, favorited, tags
PaginatedTableService.sql: select a.id as id, a.slug as slug, a.title as title, a.description as description, cast(a.created_at as varchar) as created_at, cast(a.updated_at as varchar) as updated_at, u.username as username, u.bio as bio, 'https://www.gravatar.com/avatar/' || lower(rawtohex(hash('MD5', stringtoutf8(lower(trim(u.email)))))) || '?d=identicon&s=80' as image, (select count(*) from favorites f where f.article_id = a.id) as favorites_count, exists( select 1 from favorites f where f.article_id = a.id and f.user_id = :currentUserId ) as favorited, coalesce(( select listagg(t.name, ',') within group (order by t.name) from article_tags at join tags t on t.id = at.tag_id where at.article_id = a.id ), '') as tags from articles a join users u on u.id = a.author_id join follows following on following.followed_id = a.author_id and following.follower_id = :currentUserId
